category.scope_note: Industrial AC motor comparison focused on Peru market access, NTP IEC 60034 alignment, energy efficiency, import conformity, and 60 Hz compatibility.

title.en: China-to-Peru Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial AC motor documentation against Peru INDECOPI standards, OSINERGMIN grid expectations, energy-efficiency labelling, customs, and 60 Hz operating requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业交流电动机文件与秘鲁 INDECOPI 标准、OSINERGMIN 电网要求、能效标签、海关及 60 Hz 运行要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業交流電動機文件與秘魯 INDECOPI 標準、OSINERGMIN 電網要求、能效標籤、海關及 60 Hz 運行要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INDECOPI conformity decision, OSINERGMIN grid approval, SUNAT customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Peru standards, energy, customs, and industrial requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INDECOPI 合格决定、OSINERGMIN 电网批准、SUNAT 海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验秘鲁现行标准、能源、海关及工业要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INDECOPI 合格決定、OSINERGMIN 電網批准、SUNAT 海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗秘魯現行標準、能源、海關及工業要求。

answer_first.en: The first Peru gap is frequency: industrial motors must be suitable for 60 Hz service, so a China-market 50 Hz motor is not directly compatible. Peru uses NTP IEC 60034-aligned motor standards, INDECOPI conformity routes for listed products, OSINERGMIN grid context, and energy-efficiency labelling expectations; CCC is not recognized as Peru approval.
answer_first.zh: 进入秘鲁的首要差距是频率：工业电机必须适用于 60 Hz 运行，中国内销 50 Hz 电机不能直接兼容。秘鲁采用与 IEC 60034 对齐的 NTP 电机标准、列名产品的 INDECOPI 合格路径、OSINERGMIN 电网场景及能效标签要求；CCC 不被视为秘鲁批准。
answer_first.zht: 進入秘魯的首要差距是頻率：工業電機必須適用於 60 Hz 運行，中國內銷 50 Hz 電機不能直接相容。秘魯採用與 IEC 60034 對齊的 NTP 電機標準、列名產品的 INDECOPI 合格路徑、OSINERGMIN 電網場景及能效標籤要求；CCC 不被視為秘魯批准。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
